requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — UN 38.3 and ADR Class 9 (Lithium Batteries) into Turkey
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——进入土耳其的UN 38.3及ADR第9类（锂电池）
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——進入土耳其的UN 38.3及ADR第9類（鋰電池）

summary.en: Lithium batteries (cells, battery packs, and power banks) are classified as dangerous goods for transport purposes. For air transport to or within Turkey, IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) and ICAO Technical Instructions apply, overseen by Turkey's Directorate General of Civil Aviation (SHGM); lithium-ion cells are UN 3480, batteries packed with or in equipment are UN 3481. For road transport within Turkey, ADR (European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road) applies — Turkey is a Contracting Party to ADR and enforces it through its national Dangerous Goods Transport Regulation (Tehlikeli Maddelerin Karayoluyla Taşınması Hakkında Yönetmelik) under the Ministry of Transport and Infrastructure — classifying lithium batteries as Class 9. For sea transport (most China–Turkey container traffic via Mersin and Istanbul-Ambarlı), the IMDG Code applies. All lithium batteries — regardless of origin — must have a valid UN 38.3 test report (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) before transport. The UN 38.3 test covers altitude simulation, thermal test, vibration, shock, external short-circuit, impact/crush, overcharge, and forced discharge.
summary.zh: 锂电池（电芯、电池组及移动电源）在运输上被归类为危险货物。空运至土耳其或在土耳其境内进行空运时，须遵守IATA危险品规则（DGR）及ICAO技术细则，由土耳其民航总局（SHGM）监管；锂离子电芯为UN 3480，随附设备包装或装入设备中的电池为UN 3481。在土耳其境内道路运输时适用ADR（国际公路危险货物运输欧洲协定）——土耳其是ADR缔约方，通过交通和基础设施部下的国家《危险货物公路运输条例》（Tehlikeli Maddelerin Karayoluyla Taşınması Hakkında Yönetmelik）执行，将锂电池归为第9类。海运（大部分中国—土耳其集装箱经梅尔辛和伊斯坦布尔—安巴尔勒）适用IMDG规则。所有锂电池——无论产地——在运输前须持有有效的UN 38.3测试报告（联合国危险货物运输试验和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）。UN 38.3测试涵盖高度模拟、热测试、振动、冲击、外部短路、撞击/挤压、过充及强制放电。
summary.zht: 鋰電池（電芯、電池組及行動電源）在運輸上被歸類為危險貨物。空運至土耳其或在土耳其境內進行空運時，須遵守IATA危險品規則（DGR）及ICAO技術細則，由土耳其民航總局（SHGM）監管；鋰離子電芯為UN 3480，隨附設備包裝或裝入設備中的電池為UN 3481。在土耳其境內道路運輸時適用ADR（國際公路危險品運輸歐洲協定）——土耳其是ADR締約方，通過交通和基礎設施部下的國家《危險貨物公路運輸條例》（Tehlikeli Maddelerin Karayoluyla Taşınması Hakkında Yönetmelik）執行，將鋰電池歸為第9類。海運（大部分中國—土耳其集裝箱經梅爾辛和伊斯坦堡—安巴爾勒）適用IMDG規則。所有鋰電池——無論產地——在運輸前須持有有效的UN 38.3測試報告（聯合國危險品運輸試驗和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）。UN 38.3測試涵蓋高度模擬、熱測試、振動、衝擊、外部短路、撞擊/擠壓、過充及強制放電。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — Lithium Metal and Lithium-Ion Batteries (UN 38.3)
ADR — European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road, Class 9, UN 3480 / UN 3481 — Turkey is a Contracting Party
Dangerous Goods Transport by Road Regulation (Tehlikeli Maddelerin Karayoluyla Taşınması Hakkında Yönetmelik) — Ministry of Transport and Infrastructure, Turkey
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR), current edition — Section 3.9 (UN 3480 / UN 3481); IMDG Code for sea transport via Mersin / Istanbul-Ambarlı

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 test reports for all lithium batteries transported by air, consistent with ICAO and CAAC (Civil Aviation Administration of China) requirements. For domestic road transport, GB 12268 (Dangerous Goods List) and JT/T 617 (Road Transport of Dangerous Goods) apply. For sea transport, IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) requirements apply globally. Chinese exporters shipping lithium batteries by air already typically obtain UN 38.3 test reports; however, the specific ADR classification and documentation requirements for Turkish road transport (driver training, vehicle marking, transport document format) are additional obligations not mirrored in Chinese domestic road transport rules.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有空运锂电池持有UN 38.3测试报告，符合ICAO及中国民用航空局（CAAC）要求。国内道路运输适用GB 12268（危险货物品名表）和JT/T 617（道路危险货物运输）。海运须遵守全球适用的IMDG规则（国际海运危险货物规则）。出口商通常已为空运锂电池取得UN 38.3测试报告；但土耳其道路运输的ADR分类及文件要求（驾驶员培训、车辆标识、运输文件格式）属于额外义务，在中国国内道路运输规则中无对应镜像。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有空運鋰電池持有UN 38.3測試報告，符合ICAO及中國民用航空局（CAAC）要求。國內道路運輸適用GB 12268（危險貨物品名表）和JT/T 617（道路危險貨物運輸）。海運須遵守全球適用的IMDG規則（國際海運危險貨物規則）。出口商通常已為空運鋰電池取得UN 38.3測試報告；但土耳其道路運輸的ADR分類及文件要求（駕駛員培訓、車輛標識、運輸文件格式）屬於額外義務，在中國國內道路運輸規則中無對應鏡像。

standards_or_laws: GB 12268-2012 — List of dangerous goods (SAC/SAMR) — domestic road transport classification
JT/T 617-2018 — Road transport of dangerous goods — requirements (Ministry of Transport, PRC)
CAAC Order No. 55 — Provisions on the Transport of Dangerous Goods by Civil Aviation (CAAC)

gap.en: UN 38.3 test reports are required globally (air, sea and road) and most Chinese exporters already hold them. The Turkey-specific gap is ADR compliance for road transport within Turkey, as enforced through the national Dangerous Goods Transport Regulation: transport documents must conform to ADR Chapter 5.4, packages must carry UN 3480/3481 markings per ADR 5.2, consignment limits per package apply (ADR 3.4 for small quantities), and consignors must ensure receiving parties (Turkish warehouses, distributors, hauliers) hold appropriate ADR documentation and trained personnel. Because most China–Turkey volume moves by sea through Mersin and Istanbul-Ambarlı, IMDG Code compliance and onward ADR road legs are the practical focus. For air shipments into Turkey, IATA DGR state-of-charge limits (30% maximum for loose lithium-ion cells shipped as cargo) must be observed. Exporters should confirm their UN 38.3 reports are from an accredited laboratory and cover the specific cell/pack configuration being exported.
gap.zh: UN 38.3测试报告为全球性要求（空运、海运及陆运），大多数中国出口商已持有。土耳其特有差距在于土耳其境内道路运输的ADR合规，并通过国家《危险货物运输条例》执行：运输文件须符合ADR第5.4章，包装须按ADR 5.2粘贴UN 3480/3481标识，每包裹适用限量规定（ADR 3.4小数量），托运人须确保接收方（土耳其仓库、分销商、承运人）持有相应ADR文件及受训人员。由于大部分中国—土耳其货量经梅尔辛和伊斯坦布尔—安巴尔勒海运，IMDG规则合规及后续ADR陆运段是实务重点。空运至土耳其时，须遵守IATA DGR荷电状态限制（散装锂离子电芯作为货物运输时最高30%）。出口商应确认其UN 38.3报告来自认可实验室，且涵盖出口的具体电芯/电池组配置。
gap.zht: UN 38.3測試報告為全球性要求（空運、海運及陸運），大多數中國出口商已持有。土耳其特有差距在於土耳其境內道路運輸的ADR合規，並通過國家《危險貨物運輸條例》執行：運輸文件須符合ADR第5.4章，包裝須按ADR 5.2粘貼UN 3480/3481標識，每包裹適用限量規定（ADR 3.4小數量），託運人須確保接收方（土耳其倉庫、分銷商、承運人）持有相應ADR文件及受訓人員。由於大部分中國—土耳其貨量經梅爾辛和伊斯坦堡—安巴爾勒海運，IMDG規則合規及後續ADR陸運段是實務重點。空運至土耳其時，須遵守IATA DGR荷電狀態限制（散裝鋰離子電芯作為貨物運輸時最高30%）。出口商應確認其UN 38.3報告來自認可實驗室，且涵蓋出口的具體電芯/電池組配置。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 test report required for all modes of transport (air, sea, road) globally; ADR Class 9 compliance mandatory for Turkish road transport under the national Dangerous Goods Transport Regulation; IMDG Code for sea transport via Mersin / Istanbul-Ambarlı; IATA DGR state-of-charge limits mandatory for air cargo
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — UN 38.3 required by CAAC for air transport; GB 12268 / JT/T 617 for domestic road transport; IMDG Code for sea transport

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 testing is a universal transport requirement — Chinese exporters shipping lithium batteries to Turkey must hold valid UN 38.3 test reports from accredited laboratories. Turkey-specific additions: ADR Class 9 documentation for road transport within Turkey (enforced via the national Dangerous Goods Transport Regulation), IMDG Code compliance for the sea leg through Mersin / Istanbul-Ambarlı, and IATA DGR state-of-charge limits for air cargo. Most compliant Chinese exporters already meet UN 38.3; the gap is typically in ADR documentation and Turkey-side logistics compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3测试为全球性运输要求——向土耳其出口锂电池的中国出口商须持有经认可实验室出具的有效UN 38.3测试报告。土耳其特有要求：土耳其境内道路运输的ADR第9类文件（通过国家《危险货物运输条例》执行）、经梅尔辛/伊斯坦布尔—安巴尔勒海运段的IMDG规则合规，以及空运货物的IATA DGR荷电状态限制。合规的中国出口商通常已满足UN 38.3；差距通常体现在ADR文件及土耳其方物流合规方面。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3測試為全球性運輸要求——向土耳其出口鋰電池的中國出口商須持有經認可實驗室出具的有效UN 38.3測試報告。土耳其特有要求：土耳其境內道路運輸的ADR第9類文件（通過國家《危險貨物運輸條例》執行）、經梅爾辛/伊斯坦堡—安巴爾勒海運段的IMDG規則合規，以及空運貨物的IATA DGR荷電狀態限制。合規的中國出口商通常已滿足UN 38.3；差距通常體現在ADR文件及土耳其方物流合規方面。

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — ADR dangerous goods by road (Turkey is a Contracting Party)
